sentences.arabic: أَرَدْتُ أَنْ أَتَجَوَّلَ بِحُرِّيَّةٍ فَاسْتَأْجَرْتُ سَيَّارَةً مِنَ الْمَطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Htio sam se slobodno kretati pa sam iznajmio auto na aerodromu.
sentences.translationEn: I wanted to move around freely, so I rented a car at the airport.

sentences.arabic: أَعْطَانِي الْمُوَظَّفُ مَفَاتِيحَ السَّيَّارَةِ وَشَرَحَ لِي قَوَاعِدَ الْإِيجَارِ.
sentences.translation: Službenik mi je dao ključeve i objasnio uvjete iznajmljivanja.
sentences.translationEn: The employee gave me the keys and explained the rental terms.

sentences.arabic: قُدْتُ السَّيَّارَةَ فِي شَوَارِعِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَزُرْتُ أَمَاكِنَ بَعِيدَةً عَنِ الْمَرْكَزِ.
sentences.translation: Vozio sam po ulicama grada i posjećivao mjesta daleko od centra.
sentences.translationEn: I drove through the city streets and visited places far from the centre.

sentences.translation: Put je bio širok i krajolici su bili lijepi.
sentences.translationEn: The road was wide and the scenery was beautiful.

sentences.arabic: أَعَدْتُ السَّيَّارَةَ فِي نِهَايَةِ الْيَوْمِ وَأَنَا سَعِيدٌ بِتَجْرِبَتِي.
sentences.translation: Vratio sam auto na kraju dana zadovoljan iskustvom.
sentences.translationEn: I returned the car at the end of the day, happy with the experience.
